reasons: Tigreal can group enemies before Ixia commits Full Barrage, giving her a clearer fan-shaped damage angle.
Ixia can wait for Tigreal's confirmed crowd control before entering her stationary damage window.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the grouped engage, while Ixia converts the control window into sustained backline damage.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages after Ixia is close enough to aim Full Barrage.
The fight happens around an objective, turret, or choke where enemies cannot easily spread.
failureCases: Tigreal engages outside Ixia's firing angle.
Ixia is suppressed or dived during Full Barrage.
The enemy spreads before Ixia activates her ultimate.

reasons: Atlas can pull multiple enemies into one area, giving Ixia a strong multi-target Full Barrage setup.
Ixia benefits when Atlas forces enemies to stay grouped before she commits to her stationary firing window.

proof.summary: Atlas creates the multi-target setup, while Ixia follows with fan-shaped sustained damage.
worksBestWhen: Ixia waits until Atlas finishes the pull before activating Full Barrage.
failureCases: Atlas catches only a low-value frontline target.
Ixia is too far to follow the setup.
The enemy saves suppression or hard dive for Ixia.

reasons: Diggie can protect Ixia during Full Barrage with shield and control immunity support.
Ixia gains more reliable damage uptime when Diggie saves protection for the enemy engage window.

proof.summary: Diggie protects Ixia's immobile damage window by shielding nearby allies and reducing the value of enemy crowd control.
worksBestWhen: Diggie stays close enough to cover Ixia before Full Barrage starts.
Diggie saves Time Journey for the real engage instead of poke damage.
failureCases: Ixia activates Full Barrage outside Diggie's protection range.
Diggie uses Time Journey before the enemy commits.

reasons: Minotaur gives Ixia a frontline that can absorb pressure before she commits to Full Barrage.
His healing and crowd control help Ixia survive long enough to finish her firing window.

proof.summary: Minotaur creates front space and sustain so Ixia can fire from a safer backline angle.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur holds enemy divers before they reach Ixia.
Ixia waits for Minotaur's frontline position before activating Full Barrage.
failureCases: Minotaur dives too far and leaves Ixia exposed.
Enemy assassins flank around the frontline.
Ixia stands too close before the fight starts.

reasons: Lolita can protect Ixia from ranged pressure while Ixia prepares a safe firing angle.
Ixia benefits from Lolita's frontline cover because she cannot freely reposition during Full Barrage.

proof.summary: Lolita helps protect Ixia's setup position from ranged pressure before and during her damage window.
worksBestWhen: Lolita positions between Ixia and enemy projectile pressure.
Ixia fires from behind the protected angle.
failureCases: Enemy divers bypass Lolita's shield angle.
Lolita's shield is unavailable before Ixia commits.
